---
title: "Mixed Effects analysis - dragons example"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Load packages
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(lme4)
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 13))
```

## Load data
```{r}
filepath <- here("data","dragons.csv")
dragons <- read_csv(filepath)
head(dragons)
```
